title: House 2 Pirate Ship — gold-coin chocolates and ask
prompt:
Cast (Halloween night):
- @Sara: 7yo, FAIRY-PRINCESS COSTUME — silver tiara, pink-white ombre tutu w/ crystal bodice, glittery wings, fairy wand + jack-o-lantern bucket. Wavy dark-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Eva: 3yo, PUMPKIN-ONESIE COSTUME — round orange pumpkin body w/ carved jack-o-lantern face on tummy, green leaf-stem hat, tiny pumpkin treat bucket. Curly bright-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Joe: fluffy cream-and-gold POMERANIAN dog in red-with-black-spots LADYBUG body costume.
Camera: slow dolly push, eye-level, opening medium-wide on the front lawn approach.

Scene: @ep15_house2_pirate_ship — porch dressed as a friendly cartoon pirate ship: stack of brown wooden barrels, fishnet drape on the railing, friendly cartoon plastic skull-and-crossbones flag tied to the railing. A friendly Pirate-Dad NPC stands behind the barrels — cartoon eyepatch, red-and-white striped bandana, warm grandpa-aged smiling face, holding a small wooden treasure-chest candy bowl at chest height — described in-prompt only.

0:0-0:2 — Slow dolly push, medium-wide eye-level. @Sara center-left at the foot of the porch step, @Eva center-right three steps to Sara's right, @Joe standing calm at Eva's left side. Pirate-Dad smiles big behind the barrels.

0:2-0:4 — Slow push in to medium framing on the family. @Sara and @Eva each lift their candy buckets a touch forward in a polite trick-or-treat pose. @Joe tilts his head softly to the side once, tail wagging. Pirate-Dad: "Ahoy, mateys! Welcome aboard!" @Sara: "Trick or TREAT! Have you seen our little dog Ginger?"
0:4-0:6 — Slow tilt down toward the candy bowl. Pirate-Dad gently lowers a small handful of gold-foil-wrapped round chocolate coins into Sara's bucket — gold foil only.
0:6-0:8 — Slow pan right onto Eva's bucket as more gold coins drop in. @Eva beams. Pirate-Dad: "Ain't seen 'er — but yer little pup looks like a fine search-dog!"
0:8-1:0 — Slow pull back to opening medium-wide. @Joe's tail wags faster. @Sara and @Eva, together: "Thank you!"

Lighting: warm pumpkin-orange porch glow, gentle Halloween-night ambience.
Style: Pixar 3D feature-render, cinematic kid-show, NOT scary.
cameraStyle: slow dolly push to medium, slow tilt down toward the candy bowl, capped by a slow pan right and slow pull back
closingFrame: Front-lawn approach at @ep15_house2_pirate_ship — @Sara center-left holding bucket forward with gold-foil chocolate coins inside; @Eva center-right with bucket forward, gold coins inside; @Joe standing calm at Eva's left side, tail mid-wag in bug costume; Pirate-Dad behind the barrels lowering the candy bowl with a warm grin; soft pumpkin-orange porch glow.
